course.title: Computer Science
course.description: Introduction to programming and computer science

assignments.title: Python Basics
assignments.description: Variables, data types, conditionals, and loops

assignments.title: Python Classes
assignments.description: Defining and using classes in Python

assignments.title: Data Analysis
assignments.description: Basics of data analysis: loading, exploring, and visualizing data in Python.

assignments.title: Building REST APIs with FastAPI
assignments.description: Learn to build scalable REST APIs using the FastAPI framework with HTTP methods, data validation, and automatic documentation.

assignments.title: Python Text Processing
assignments.description: Master string manipulation, file I/O operations, and text processing techniques including parsing, transformation, and data extraction.

assignments.title: Data Structures in Python
assignments.description: Master Python's core data structures: lists, dictionaries, sets, and tuples. Learn when to use each structure and solve problems efficiently.

assignments.title: Python Data Visualization
assignments.description: Create effective data visualizations using matplotlib and plotly. Master static and interactive charts, dashboards, and data presentation techniques.

assignments.title: Statistics with Python
assignments.description: Master statistical analysis and data manipulation using pandas and numpy. Learn data cleaning, exploratory analysis, and hypothesis testing.
